description: The QUICK_ACTIONS array includes hardcoded action labels, but these could be stored in a constants file for easier maintenance and potential future localization. Move QUICK_ACTIONS to client/src/lib/constants.ts or a dedicated client/src/components/AIAssistant.constants.ts file.
successCriteria: QUICK_ACTIONS is exported from a constants file
AIAssistant.tsx imports and uses the constant
The constant includes a JSDoc comment explaining what it's for
